exchanges.expected: Quiero poner cuarenta dólares de gasolina.
exchanges.hint: I want to put in forty dollars of gas.

exchanges.expected: Sí, por favor llene el tanque completo.
exchanges.hint: Yes, please fill the tank completely.

exchanges.expected: Sí, aquí tiene el recibo, gracias.
exchanges.hint: Yes, here is the receipt, thank you.

exchanges.expected: No, el aceite ya fue revisado.
exchanges.hint: No, the oil has already been checked.

exchanges.expected: La bomba de aire está al lado de la tienda.
exchanges.hint: The air pump is next to the store.

exchanges.expected: Voy a pagar con tarjeta de crédito, por favor.
exchanges.hint: I'm going to pay with a credit card, please.

exchanges.expected: Sí, quiero una botella de agua, por favor.
exchanges.hint: Yes, I want a bottle of water, please.
